metadata.description: Generates random values across the texture using hash function

summary: White Noise generates completely uncorrelated random values per pixel. Unity has Random node and can use Simple Noise at high scale.
unity_equivalent: Shader Graph Random Node or Custom Hash Function
implementation_notes: Use Random node in Shader Graph or implement hash-based white noise in custom code.
approximation: Random node provides similar functionality. Simple Noise at very high scale approaches white noise.

blender_parameters.name: vector
blender_parameters.description: Position to generate noise for deterministic randomness

step_1.name: Add Random Node
step_1.description: Use Shader Graph Random node with UV input

step_2.name: Custom Implementation
step_2.description: For 3D/4D or specific hash algorithms, use custom code

blender_to_unity_mapping.unity_implementation: Random node input or custom hash function
blender_to_unity_mapping.notes: Random node works for 2D. Custom hash needed for 3D/4D.

blender_to_unity_mapping.unity_implementation: Use corresponding dimension in custom function

build_instructions.action: Option 1: Use existing Noise Texture subgraph (RECOMMENDED)
build_instructions.note: Set noise type to White Noise in the subgraph properties

build_instructions.action: Option 2: Use Unity's Simple Noise at high scale

limitations: Custom hash function required for different algorithms

unity_recreation.description: Use Random node with UV input for white noise
